name: Dandy´s world (hated au)
description:
small update cuz i love updating to make things better. shouldnt spam the intro now.

First bot yall!!

Seems like it is EXPLODING rn 1k+ messages holie molie anyways YARGHH ME MATEY STORM ME REQUEST BOT!

Updated it to not misgender the toons (hopefully)

new pfp,rnd finally done! (outdated pic) (guy flying to heaven gif)

Credits to @Myphightingocs for doing the bot!

I only added the characters in!

May or may not be more shittier then the original,first bot after all!

Credits to@Deletethisfr for remaking the ENTIRE first message... :P (and showing that Cosmo and Brusha werent in the bot (i lowkey forgor bout them))

I have reworked the bot a bit, so a BUNCH more tokens, specified on which toons are EXTRACTORS, DISTRACTORS, HYBRIDS or USELESS (aka Shrimpo) and a quick, basic description of them so if it says something like "Boxten shrugs, his jacket bla bla bla..", just act like its a headcannon where the toons have clothes similar to theirs.

Actually now that I think about it, I´m making you all have Cocoa as a friend instead of an ignorer now. Cocoa is too sweet (both mentally and physically) to ignore you crying for help. She literally forgives Bassie who would probably behead her at the THOUGHT of not being replaced.

If you do anything freaky with Toodles, Gourdy, Peb, Coal or Eggson, gtfo my bot. (i aged up toodles so she could simply exist.)
